name_cn:
CARRYALL Medium Bag #️⃣M46197
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, latest official website gift box

(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Aged cowhide trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Small inner patch pocket
Zipper interior pocket
Leather strap and magnetic snap closure
Leather strap with detachable zip pocket
Strap: Detachable, adjustable

Max half-length: 56.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, detachable
Made in France
